title: TANÁCSADÓI TAPASZTALATOK OLASZORSZÁGBAN: HOGYAN MŰKÖDIK EGY INTEGRÁLT BAROMFITERMELÉSI RENDSZER
description: A guide presenting advisory experiences in Italy for establishing and operating integrated poultry production systems, detailing key steps such as farmer preparation, group work for development plans, and disease prevention measures. It outlines a structured approach using SMART objectives and PDCA cycles to engage stakeholders and improve biosecurity through participatory roundtable discussions.
